category_uid: Integer: Required: Numeric category UID aligned to control/compliance evaluation.

finding_info.title: String: Required: Short title of the control evaluation finding.
finding_info.desc: String: Required: Description of what was evaluated and why.
finding_info.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of this finding.
finding_info.types: Array: Optional: Types such as control_evaluation, compliance_assessment, source_code_access_review.

severity_id: Integer: Required: Severity level of control weakness (1 Low, 2 Medium, 3 High, 4 Critical).
status: String: Required: Overall evaluation result. Values: Compliant, Partially Compliant, Non-Compliant.
status_detail: String: Optional: Additional explanation for the result.
message: String: Optional: Summary of control evaluation outcome.
confidence_id: Integer: Optional: Confidence score 0–100 for evaluation accuracy.
time: String: Required: Time when evaluation was generated (ISO 8601).
start_time: String: Optional: Start of assessment period.
end_time: String: Optional: End of assessment period.

repository.name: String: Required: Repository or project name.
repository.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of repository.

user.name: String: Optional: User associated with evaluation.
user.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of user.
user.type: String: Optional: User type (Human, Service Account, Bot).

access_control.permission: String: Optional: Effective permission (Read, Write, Admin).
access_control.reviewer: String: Optional: Reviewer approving access or PR.
access_control.is_approved_exception: Boolean: Optional: True if exception-based access.

session.is_mfa: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether MFA was used.

auth_protocol: String: Optional: Authentication method (OAuth, SSH, SAML, etc.).
control_id: String: Required: Control identifier. Example: ISO27001:2022-A.8.4.
control_name: String: Required: Control name. Example: Access to Source Code.
control_description: String: Required: Description of control objective and requirement.

assessment_period.start_time: String: Required: Start time of evaluation period.
assessment_period.end_time: String: Required: End time of evaluation period.

authorized_access.description: String: Required: Ensure only authorized users have access.
authorized_access.logic: String: Required: PASS if no unauthorized privileged access exists.
authorized_access.violation_count: Integer: Optional: Number of unauthorized access violations.

authentication_strength.description: String: Required: Ensure strong authentication (MFA) is enforced.
authentication_strength.logic: String: Required: PASS if MFA enforced for sensitive access.
authentication_strength.violation_count: Integer: Optional: Number of weak authentication cases.

repository_protection.description: String: Required: Ensure repository and branches are protected.
repository_protection.logic: String: Required: PASS if no direct unauthorized modifications allowed.
repository_protection.violation_count: Integer: Optional: Number of protection failures.

change_control_workflow.description: String: Required: Ensure changes go through PR and approval workflow.
change_control_workflow.logic: String: Required: PASS if no direct commits or bypass.
change_control_workflow.violation_count: Integer: Optional: Number of workflow violations.

auditability.description: String: Required: Ensure all actions are logged and traceable.
auditability.logic: String: Required: PASS if full traceability exists.
auditability.violation_count: Integer: Optional: Number of missing audit logs.

overall_status: String: Required: Final result (Compliant, Partially Compliant, Non-Compliant).
evidence_summary: String: Optional: Summary of analyzed evidence.
remediation_actions: Array: Optional: List of remediation steps.

metadata.version: String: Required: OCSF schema version e.g. 1.0.0.

product.name: String: Required: System generating this evaluation (e.g., Shuffle).
product.vendor_name: String: Optional: Vendor or internal owner.
